JUDGE BATCH FOR PAGE: docs/src/content/docs/enterprise/apm-policy.md
Apply assets/judge-prompt.md to each tuple below.
Return one JSON verdict per claim_id, in a JSON array.
---

{
  "claim_id": "c2",

TUPLE claim_id=c4:
{
  "claim_id": "c4",
  "claim_text": "MCP transport policy accepts http and stdio but blocks sse and streamable-http by default.",
  "evidence": [
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",

TUPLE claim_id=c5:
{
  "claim_id": "c5",
  "claim_text": "The apm install --no-policy flag and APM_POLICY_DISABLE=1 environment variable skip policy enforcement at install time.",

    },

TUPLE claim_id=c6:
{
  "claim_id": "c6",
  "claim_text": "Child repo policies can only tighten parent org policies, never relax them.",

    },

      "matched_keyword": "inherit"

      "matched_keyword": "inherit"
    },
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",

      "matched_keyword": "parent"
    },
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",
      "line": 404,

      "matched_keyword": "parent"
    },
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",
      "line": 410,
      "snippet": "    Partial-chain policy: if any parent fetch fails, emit a warning via",
      "matched_keyword": "parent"
    },
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",
      "line": 429,
      "snippet": "    # Ordered ancestors collected as we walk parents.  Built leaf-first",
      "matched_keyword": "parent"
    },
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",
      "line": 464,

TUPLE claim_id=c14:
{
  "claim_id": "c14",
  "claim_text": "The trust_transitive field merge rule is parent AND child - both must allow it.",
  "evidence": [
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/discovery.py",
      "line": 1064,
      "snippet": "            \"trust_transitive\": policy.mcp.trust_transitive,",
      "matched_keyword": "trust_transitive"
    },
    {
      "file": "src/apm_cli/policy/parser.py",

TUPLE claim_id=c15:
